notes: Aligns manual Projects and Routines sections with the Creation Wizard output model.
Project steps and routine activities now automatically create calendar time, weekly tasklist rows and Google Tasks checklist items.
Manual project/routine activity forms now require start date/time and finish date/time before saving.
Routine activities inherit the routine repeat pattern rather than setting their own repeat days.
Avoids duplicate Google Tasks checklist items when wizard-created records already have explicit task prompt rows.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release_notes: Aligns manual project and routine activity creation with the wizard: calendar time, weekly tasklist rows and Google Tasks checklist items are automatic, with start and finish details required before saving.
